channel.title: M. Ilham Syaputra
channel.description: Recent content on M. Ilham Syaputra

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Working Experiences

Backend Engineer

Ihsan Solusi Informatika
Apr 2023 – Present · 2 yrs 11 mos
Remote
  • Developed and delivered 6+ production backend services for mission-critical financial workflows.
  • Migrated legacy systems into 100+ gRPC-based backend APIs with improved performance and maintainability.
  • Achieved up to 95% database query performance improvement through targeted optimization.
  • Improved partner integrations by building secure, well-documented APIs and collaborating across teams.

Education

Apple Developer Academy

Infinite Learning
Feb 2024 – Dec 2024 · 10 mos
Batam, Indonesia

Bachelor of Engineering

Universitas Jambi
Jul 2017 – Oct 2022 · 5 yrs 3 mos
Jambi, Indonesia

Projects & Awards

Azkarna - Daily Sunnah Prayer App

Apple Developer Academy @ Infinite Learning
Oct 2024 – Nov 2024 · 1 mo
Built a location-aware prayer companion application, focusing on reliable reminder scheduling and consistent user experience across devices, including smartwatch integration.

HireVoice - Interview Practice & Feedback App

Apple Developer Academy @ Infinite Learning
Aug 2024 – Sep 2024 · 1 mo
Designed and implemented structured answer evaluation logic based on the STAR framework, enabling users to practice interview responses and receive actionable, criteria-driven feedback.

Astrodam - Puzzle-Based Space Adventure Game

Apple Developer Academy @ Infinite Learning
Jun 2024 – Jul 2024 · 1 mo
Developed interactive puzzle gameplay with real-time user input handling, emphasizing responsiveness, state management, and intuitive player feedback.

Auraskin - Skincare Ingredients Analysis App

Apple Developer Academy @ Infinite Learning
Apr 2024 – May 2024 · 1 mo
Built an application to evaluate skincare ingredient suitability and risk, focusing on clear decision support and reducing user error in product selection.

1st Place - Software Competition

Geophysical Engineering, Sumatera Institute of Technology
Jan 2022 – Jan 2022 ·
Developed a software solution for geoscientific data processing.

2nd Place - NQ Geoscientific Software Developer Competition

NewQuest Geotechnology
Jan 2021 – Jan 2021 ·
Competed in national-level geoscientific software development challenge.

item.title: Welcome to M. Ilham Syaputra's posts!
item.description:
Introduction

I’m a backend engineer who enjoys building reliable systems, exploring homelabs, and sharing notes about software engineering, finance, and things learned along the way.
